strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows, directly aligning with required skill
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating initiative and depth
concerns: Lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright — key required technologies in the stack
Limited evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles despite being a secondary requirement
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a proven track record in building scalable, testable systems — all core to the role. However, the absence of confirmed experience with Nest.js and Vitest, along with minimal recent Java/Kotlin exposure, introduces risk. His open-source initiative and cross-stack adaptability offset some gaps, but the stack mismatch requires clarification.
